name: GitHub Accounts Deprovisioned on Termination
description: Ensures GitHub organization access is revoked when personnel leave the company
query: SELECT g.id, g.login, g.email, e.termination_date FROM github_organization_members g JOIN employees e ON g.email = e.work_email WHERE e.status = 'terminated' AND g.org_membership_state = 'active'
remediation: Remove GitHub organization access for terminated employees within 24 hours of termination.
